name: Simple Piston Door
description: Build a 1x2 piston door that opens when a lever is flipped. Use sticky pistons to push blocks up and down. The door should be 1 block wide and 2 blocks tall, with a lever to activate it.
hints: Place the blocks that will be pushed above the pistons
Connect redstone from lever to pistons
May need a repeater for signal strength

verification.initial_state: Door blocks should be in closed position (covering the doorway)
verification.expected_result: Door blocks should retract upward, opening the doorway

test_coords.door_blocks_when_open: Should be at Y=102 or higher
